reports.incident_description: ICU AHU-2 not holding 22C; temp fluctuating 24–26C and alarms frequent. Please check chilled water valve/actuator before rounds.
Theatre 2 negative pressure not maintaining; door closer misaligned and pressure drops when door shuts. Need urgent HVAC/door seal review.
After the morning drizzle, ceiling leak near CT cable tray; water dripping close to power trunking. Area cordoned off.
Basement stores sump pump not cutting in; 2–3 cm water pooling after rain. Request immediate check of pump and float switches.
During weekly genny test, ATS failed to transfer back to CEB mains; manual return required. Inspect ATS controller and interlocks.
OPD male toilet flush line has very low pressure; multiple pans not clearing. Likely valve/N.R.V. stuck.
Fire alarm shows intermittent fault in Zone 4 (Paeds); repeater beeping through night. Please trace detector/cabling issue.
Short shower caused skylight leak over dispensing counter; floor wet near shelving. Need sealant and check for cracked pane.
Oxygen outlet at Bed 12 hissing and loose; flowmeter wobbles. Shut valve for now—urgent pipeline check needed.
NICU RH above 65%; AHU-1 filters likely choked and incubators fogging. Please service AHU and verify humidistat.
Staff lift No.2 intermittently stops with doors half open at Level 1; occurred three times this morning. Needs immediate inspection.
Strong diesel smell at generator day tank; small drip visible at bottom flange. Drip tray placed—please rectify leak.
Humid afternoon causing condensation from supply duct near scope cleaning area; floor getting wet. Check insulation and condensate drain.
After brief rain, water seeped from roof gutter into Stair C landing; steps slippery. Clear downpipe and repair flashing.
During fire drill, Isolation Room 3 maglock did not release on alarm; door remained secured. Immediate fix required.
Noted repeated mains dips; UPS switching frequently. Suspect phase imbalance at Lab MDB—please test and tighten terminations.
OPD entrance auto door shudders and fails to open fully; sensor seems misaligned. Queue forming outside.
Theatre 1 wall suction weak during list; central vacuum reading low. Kindly check vacuum pumps and pipeline leaks.
Loose roof tiles above ambulance bay walkway rattling; one tile shifted and may fall. Please secure before night.
Light rain this morning; water seeping along basement corridor to CSSD. Pump alarm lit and floor wet—request immediate action.
Fire panel shows ground fault on Zone 7 (Records Store) after damp morning; buzzer silenced, fault persists. Inspect loop/wiring.
Ward 5 AHU tripped twice around noon; ward became very warm. Check condenser coil and filters ASAP.
Feed water pressure to RO plant low; pre-filter differential high. Please clean/replace strainers and verify inlet line.
After afternoon rain, Lift 1 out of service; panel shows 'pit water detected'. Need pit pumped out and system reset.
Rainwater overflowing from gutter onto canteen external steps; slippery where public walks. Unclog downpipe and add anti-slip.
OPD waiting hall not cooling; AHU blowing warm air since late morning, patients getting restless.
After brief shower, water seeped under rear door of Physio gym; likely blocked courtyard drain, slip risk.
Damp patch appearing on basement corridor ceiling near pharmacy store post-rain; buckets placed, please check source.
CSSD sterilizer room exhaust fan failed; heat build-up making work unsafe, kindly rectify.
Patient lift No. 2 stalled twice at 3rd floor; doors reopen with alarm, delays theatre transfers.
Condensation from AHU duct dripping near ICU isolation entrance; floor repeatedly wet despite mopping.
Light rain leaked above OPD counters; water near power strips and on floor—urgent cleanup and sealing needed.
Diesel day tank low-level alarm; auto transfer pump not refilling from main tank, genset readiness at risk.
Multiple ABC fire extinguishers on Ward 12 corridor show low pressure and overdue servicing.
Expansion joint cover on veranda has come loose and is flapping in the wind; risk to staff and visitors below.
Minor Theatre 1 smells dusty; AHU filters likely choked and temp slow to reach setpoint.
Power dip during thunder; ATS changed over late and ICU UPS alarmed—please test ATS and earthing immediately.
Basement ramp took in rainwater; one sump pump tripped—water approaching medical records archive.
Water noted in Lift B shaft after evening rain through louvre; lift isolated, need inspection and drying.
Maternity OT oxygen pressure dropped and area valve box alarmed; request immediate MGPS check of regulators/valves.
Cooling tower make-up float stuck open; continuous overflow to drain near Paediatrics OPD.
NICU anteroom door closer broken; airlock not sealing and warm corridor air entering.
Main entrance canopy leaking after morning drizzle; granite floor slippery and mats soaked—need anti-slip signs and sealing.
Chiller-2 tripped on high pressure in afternoon heat; wards reporting rising room temperatures.
Polycarbonate roof panel over OPD walkway cracked; piece rattling in breeze—fall hazard.
Manifold shed ventilation fan off; oxygen cylinder area very warm—ventilation not per code.
Histology room dehumidifier not running; RH at 75% and paraffin blocks turning tacky.
Gusts dislodged cladding above OPD driveway; panel hanging by two screws—immediate securing needed.
Post-rain, rooftop AHU-4 breaker tripped; moisture observed inside junction box and cable gland.
Pigeons nesting in Block B roof gutter; droppings and feathers falling near canteen entrance—request netting and cleanup.
OPD waiting area ceiling has condensate dripping; AHU not dehumidifying in this evening humidity. Floor getting wet despite mopping; please check chilled-water valve control and drain traps.
UPS room split AC not cooling; room temp at 33°C and inverters issuing high-temp alarm. Need immediate restoration or temporary cooling.
After the thunderstorm, roof leak above surgical corridor near Bed 14; steady drip causing slip hazard. Suspect flashing loosened by wind.
OPD entrance canopy fascia panel is loose and vibrating in gusts; may detach onto public walkway. Request urgent securing or removal.
Basement near Radiology: stormwater sump pump tripped; 3–4 cm water pooling close to live cable trays.
Chiller-2 high-pressure trip during heat peak; ICU AHUs showing 26–27°C supply. Need immediate restart and condenser cleaning.
Lift B went to fault after brief downpour; water observed at shaft head. Please check shaft flashing, pit pump, and controller.
NICU fire door not self-closing; door closer weak and latch misaligned. Fire compartmentation compliance at risk.
Main OT AHU prefilter DP reading 380 Pa (above limit); airflow low and temp/humidity drifting. Request filter change and belt check.
Sluice room foul water backing up into floor drain after rain; strong odour entering ward. Possible check valve failure.
Generator room ventilation fan not running; room ~38°C during standby test. Risk of overheating switchgear.
After heavy rain, B-Block electrical riser is damp; RCD feeding Ward 7 sockets tripped. Medication prep area without power.
Canteen roof drain blocked; water ponding and seeping into staff dining. Slippery floor despite signage.
Pharmacy ceiling condensate from chilled-water valve insulation dripping onto cartons. Need insulation repair and drain check.
ETU ambulance bay roofing sheets rattling post-squall; one fixing screw missing. Potential sheet uplift hazard.
OPD minor theatre oxygen outlet (Bed 2) leaking with audible hiss even without flowmeter. Requires outlet isolation and replacement.
Lab vacuum suction low in phlebotomy area during afternoon rain; gauge ~200 mmHg vs usual 450. Please inspect vacuum pump and lines.
Isolation ward negative pressure alarm; monitor shows +2 Pa. Exhaust fan belt appears slack; room doors pulling outwards.
Level 2 main corridor: ceiling tile sagging above Ward 5 entrance; likely old leak. Tile at risk of falling.
Weekly genset test revealed coolant drip at radiator lower hose; small puddle observed. Replace hose/clamps before next outage.
OPD access ramp slippery after morning drizzle; visible algae growth. Request pressure-wash and install anti-slip strips.
Clinic corridor water filter inlet joint leaking; steady drip forming wet patch and trip hazard. Shut-off valve hard to close.
OT 3 laminar flow low-velocity alarm; HEPA prefilter likely clogged. VFD shows 60% but setpoint not met.
Basement lift pit water level alarm after heavy rain; submersible pump may have failed. Lift A isolated from service.
Fire alarm activated in maternity; water ingress noted in detector near veranda. Need detector replacement and roof resealing.
Condensation dripping from AHU supply duct above Bed 3; floor wet. Please clear condensate drain and re-insulate.
Rainwater leaking through OPD foyer false ceiling during thunder; slippery near registration. Need roof/gutter repair.
CEB power dip with lightning made Lift 1 stop and reset at Level 2. Please check supply quality and lift controls.
Chiller 2 showing high condensing temperature alarm; cooling tower fan noisy under heat load.
Persistent sewage odour near ward corridor; likely gully trap/inspection chamber blockage. Please jet and disinfect.
Basement sump pump tripped after late storm; water rising near records archive. Immediate dewatering needed.
Automatic sliding door at OPD stuck open; cooling loss and security concern. Kindly service sensor/track.
After brief downpour, seepage above CT room doorway; damp near cable tray. Request roof flashing sealing.
Main OT AHU not meeting temperature/humidity; feels muggy. Please check AHU and change filters.
Short outage during storm: DG started but no load; ATS did not transfer. Immediate rectification required.
Fire alarm panel shows 'Ground Fault Loop 2' post-rain in Block B. Suspect moisture ingress in detector circuit.
Gutter overflow above NICU causing drip near an electrical DB. Area cordoned; need urgent roof/gutter clearing.
Bed lift jerks with grinding sound between Ground and Level 1. Please inspect guide rails and motor.
Heavy rain backing up stormwater at JMO path; walkway flooded. Request drain clearing and pump-out.
UPS room AC not cooling; room at 31°C with alarms. Need urgent service of split AC.
AHU condensate line blocked; water dripping through ceiling near nurses’ station after evening storm.
Low oxygen pipeline pressure alarm in Surgical Ward; cylinders fine. Please check manifold/regulator and line.
Ambulance bay waterlogged after rain; gullies clogged and floor slippery for stretchers. Kindly clear.
ETU main door slamming; hydraulic closer failed. Safety risk to patients and staff.
Lightning observed; down-conductor clamp of lightning arrester loose on East Block roof with visible arcing.
During storm-run, DG radiator fan belt frayed; coolant temp rising. Replace belt before next outage.
Water seepage into transformer room via cable trench; puddling near LV panel. Need sealing and dewatering.
Block C fire exit door swollen and not closing; alarm beeping. Please adjust door and ironmongery.
Jockey pump running continuously; sprinkler pressure falling. Wet patch at L2 maternity stairwell—suspected leak.
Main entrance canopy gutter partially detached and swinging after heavy rain; area cordoned. Need urgent fixing.
During heavy rain, water is leaking through the OPD triage ceiling onto a live plug bar; floor wet despite mopping. Please inspect roof/gutter and make area electrically safe.
Brief mains dip with thunder; genset started but ATS failed to transfer for DB-2. Manual changeover done. Request immediate ATS contactor/logic inspection.
Stormwater not draining at CSSD loading bay; gully overflowing and surface slippery for sterile trolley movement.
Lift-3 auto shutdown; water observed in pit after torrential rain. Need pumping and sealing; service call required before restarting.
Rainwater dripping through manifold shed roof onto oxygen header and gauges. Please repair roofing and check for moisture ingress to keep compliance.
Basement substation had minor water ingress from cable trench during downpour; one MCCB tripped. Circuits isolated. Require trench sealing and insulation checks.
NICU AHU not dehumidifying; RH 72% with condensation near warmers after morning squalls. Request urgent HVAC service (filters/coil/airflow).
Persistent sewage odour and slow drain in ward toilets after night rain; likely blocked gully trap. Patients complaining.
Roof sheet above dialysis walkway loosened in wind; flapping and screws missing. Risk to patients on trolleys.
Basement parking ramp very slippery in continuous drizzle; algae noted. Cones placed. Request pressure wash and anti-slip coating.
Fire detector near OPD pharmacy shows intermittent fault after rain; likely moisture in junction box. Panel beeping repeatedly.
Kitchen rear area waterlogged; silted gully causing runoff to enter dry store threshold during heavy rain. Needs immediate clearing and bunding.
Vacuum line suction weak in OT-2; central vacuum gauge fluctuating since morning. Cases at risk—please check pumps and condensate drains.
Ceiling tile above nurses’ station is sagging with brown stains after full-day rain; could fall on the desk.
UPS room AC not cooling; room at 31°C and rising, UPS fans running hard. Need HVAC attention ASAP.
After lightning and generator changeover, one ICU sub-circuit did not transfer to emergency supply; outlets flickered. Request ATS/panel testing immediately.
OPD entrance canopy signboard bolts loosened in high winds; sign is swaying over the queue line. Please secure.
Leak at 3rd-floor fire hydrant branch; corroded GI elbow seeping into corridor and pressure drops during test.
Toilet floor flooding from drain during evening rain; suspect common stack choke. Housekeeping unable to clear.
Sterile store AC condensate overflowing and pooling near shelving; humidity high after afternoon storm. Risk to packaging integrity.
Roof leak dripping near vaccine fridge socket during intense downpour; electrical hazard to cold-chain equipment.
Stormwater sump Pump-2 not starting; level rising towards lift pit. Float switch appears stuck; manual bypass not engaging.
Emergency exit light and sounder on 4th floor failed during drill; battery pack appears dead. Replacement/testing needed.
Diesel seeping from generator day tank return union after prolonged run; floor slick and fumes strong. Needs tightening and cleanup.
ICU medical air line pressure oscillating; likely faulty secondary regulator at ward riser. No audible leaks.
Ceiling above OPD registration is leaking after the morning downpour; tiles sagging and water tracking towards two live sockets.
Strong winds have thrown the main entrance sliding door off alignment; door keeps jamming and hitting the frame.
ICU corridor floor is wet from condensation; AHU not dehumidifying in this humidity and the temp is drifting.
During the brief grid dip, the standby generator failed to auto-start; ATS alarmed then reset. Please investigate before night shift.
Water pooling in the fire pump room after the thunderstorm; seepage near the controller panel base.
After the heavy shower, water dripped through a light fitting in Ward 12; pronounced leak near the nurses’ station.
Lift 2 stopped between 2nd and 3rd floors during the lightning burst; two staff inside, intercom working but car not moving.
Basement sump pumps did not cut in after the rain; water level rising near pharmacy bulk stores.
Wind has loosened the OPD canopy sign; the panel is swinging above the patient queue.
Oxygen pipeline pressure to Theatre Complex dropped twice this morning; manifold pressure stable, suspect corridor valve box leak.
ICU AHU emitting a grinding noise and airflow is low; bedsides feel warm despite setpoint.
Rainwater is seeping under the side door into Radiology; floor slippery near X‑ray room entrance.
Gen-set day tank level sensor is stuck high causing nuisance alarms and erratic auto-refill commands.
Roofing sheet above kitchen service yard is rattling badly in the wind; screws look loose and sheet could lift.
Short power flicker caused NICU non-essential lighting to go off; UPS bypass reported a fault and ATS chattered.
Multiple false fire alarms from Ward 7 after the rain; panel shows earth fault, likely water in conduit.
After the early downpour, the gully by OPD clogged and sewage backed into the staff toilet; strong odour present.
Fire exit door at Stair C is not self-closing and keeps slamming in the wind; closer failed and latch misaligned.
AHU condensate drain overflowed into the Theatre 2 ceiling plenum; humidity climbing and drip marks on tiles.
Chilled Water Pump-2 tripped after a brief outage; delta-T low and wards on Block B are reporting warm rooms.
Cold Room 1 high head pressure alarm; condenser choked with storm debris and room temp rising.
Ceiling plaster fell in the ANC corridor after the heavy rain; leak at roof joint still active, debris on floor.
Isolation Ward negative pressure not holding; exhaust fan belt slipping and supply damper hunting in the wind.
Pantry taps showing low chlorine smell and cloudy water after the rain band; please flush tank and adjust dosing.
Underground diesel transfer pump overheated and tripped during the afternoon downpour; generator on test could not refuel.
Ceiling fan on female side of Ward 3 emitted burnt smell; MCB in sub-board felt warm. Morning humidity high. Please isolate and inspect.
During heavy rain, water dripped from OPD registration ceiling near computers; bucket placed and floor slippery. Suspect blocked gutter above.
Two voltage dips on CEB supply after thunder; ICU UPS alarmed. Generator did not transfer—ATS appears in MANUAL. Immediate check needed.
Main Pharmacy AC not cooling; RH above 70%, blister packs getting tacky. Please check AHU and return air dampers.
Basement near electrical room taking water with steady rain; sump pump not cutting in. Water within 2 cm of panel base.
Roof sheet over OPD side entrance rattling in breeze; one screw missing. Risk to queueing patients.
Lift 2 stuck between G and 1 with a trolley and porter; alarm works, car fan off. Please release and service controller battery.
After lightning, chiller tripped; OT temperature rising to 27°C. Surgeries delayed—need urgent reset and surge protection review.
Ramp handrail to Dialysis is loose; base bolts rusted through. High wheelchair traffic—please secure before first session.
Sewage odour along Paediatric corridor; gully pit bubbling after light rain. Request jetting and trap checks.
Fire alarm panel shows intermittent fault in Pathology stores; one ceiling detector has moisture stain. Humid evening.
Emergency exit light on 3rd floor Surgical Block failed during test; test switch OK but unit dark—battery likely dead.
Pipeline oxygen pressure low alarm at 06:05; portable cylinders OK. Suspect leak at Bed 12 headwall outlet.
Minor OT changing room ceiling tile sagging with wet patch after night rain; droplets forming—risk of collapse.
Surface water entering OPD foyer during rain; mats soaked and floor slippery. Need sandbags and gutter/downpipe clearing.
Strong diesel fumes along back corridor during generator test; exhaust louvers jammed half-closed.
Wall suction in Resus Bay weak with constant hiss; likely vacuum pipeline leak at outlet. Procedures being delayed.
Covered walkway leak dripping onto a live light fitting; small spark seen during evening rain. Local switch isolated.
Cold Room 2 temperature rising to 12°C; condenser coils dusty and door gasket torn. Contents at risk.
Fallen branch after gusts damaged boundary wall and car-park light conduit. Area cordoned off; needs repair.
Primary chilled-water Pump B vibrating heavily; mechanical seal spraying. Recommend isolate and run on Pump A until repaired.
Condensation dripping from AHU duct above incubators; filters likely clogged and humidity high on ward.
Basement archive flooded 3–4 cm after rain; cartons wet. Sump pump appears off; need water extraction and dehumidifiers.
Weekly drill: fire pump failed to auto-start; manual start OK. Jockey pump cycling every 2 minutes—check controller and pressure switch.
Flush valve in gents toilet leaking continuously; water seeping under tiles into corridor creating slip risk.
Condensation pooling under ceiling diffuser; corridor floor slippery due to morning humidity. Please adjust AC and fix drain.
Rainwater seeping through pharmacy skylight during afternoon shower; cartons getting damp. Request roof sealing and temporary cover.
Brief power dip; lifts stalled momentarily. ATS to generator chattered. Please check synchronization and voltage settings.
Heavy rain caused water ingress near basement records; sump pump appears tripped. Floor wet and slippery.
Storm rain leaking via window frame; ceiling tile bulging above Bed 8. Request immediate make-safe.
AHU not holding setpoint; temp 24.5 C and RH high. Elective list may be delayed; need HVAC check.
Vacuum pipeline suction weak at two pendants; gauge low. Suspect MGPS restriction; please inspect urgently.
Chiller-2 high temp alarm; ICU supply air >23 C. Immediate HVAC intervention required.
After rain, OPD ramp is slippery; gully clogged and water pooling. Need clearing and non-slip mats.
Weekly generator test: radiator fan belt frayed and near failure. Request replacement before next load test.
Fire door to NICU not self-closing; latch misaligned. Please repair and certify.
Gusty rain leaking above X-ray control console; water tracking along cable tray. Power isolated.
High-mast light at staff car park bent after strong winds; base bolts loose. Area cordoned off.
Service corridor outside kitchen flooded with wastewater during light rain; gully blocked; foul odour spreading.
AHU filter DP 450 Pa; airflow reduced. Request filter change and balancing before noon cases.
Fire alarm panel shows Zone 4 fault after thunder; possible MCP/detector loop issue. Kindly investigate.
Gutter overflow during shower; downpipe blocked and water spilling onto entry steps. Slip hazard.
Split AC condensate drain blocked; water dripping near bed head panel and outlets. Please attend ASAP.
Lift 2 tripped during afternoon rain; water visible in shaft pit. Power isolated for safety.
Lobby false ceiling tile soaked and fell; suspected chilled water pipe insulation leak above.
Staircase handrail at Ward 6 mid-landing is loose; screws pulled out. Please secure.
Emergency exit light on 3rd floor fails on battery test. Replace unit/backup pack.
Medical air dryer showing high dew point; risk of moisture in MGPS. Check desiccant and auto drains.
Downpour caused roof drain overflow; water entered CSSD corridor. Sterile packs at risk if not contained.
Ambulance bay flooded; one trench drain grate displaced. Vehicles struggling to dock safely.
ICU corridor floor wet from AHU condensate due to today’s humidity; two near slips. Please clear condensate drain and place anti-slip mats.
OT 2 AHU not maintaining setpoint; temp 28°C, RH high. Elective list at risk. Request urgent HVAC inspection and filter check.
OPD entrance ramp ponding after evening showers; drain likely blocked with debris. Slip hazard for clinic crowd. Please clear and squeegee.
Ceiling leak near window bay after rain; drip falling over Bed 14 area. Need roof flashing repair and ceiling tile replacement.
Lift 2 machine room very hot; exhaust fan not running. Motor overheating alarm observed. Request ventilation repair to prevent lift shutdown.
Roof leak over nurses’ station during afternoon rain; water dripping onto electrical trunking. Kindly isolate power and attend roof urgently.
UPS beeping due to voltage dips after gusty showers; lights flicker. Please check AVR and MDB feeders for stabilization.
ETU AHU stopped after thunder; area getting warm and stuffy. Request immediate restart and check of surge protection.
Basement pump room water ingress during storm; Sump Pump 2 not starting. Rising water near electrical panels—urgent dewatering required.
Surgical Block fire exit door at L2 not latching; door scrapes floor. Compromises compartmentation. Please plane door and fix closer.
Clinic waiting area smells musty after intermittent rain; condensation from diffuser dripping onto bench. Need AHU filter change and drain check.
ICU Bed 6 oxygen outlet gauge fluctuating with audible hiss. Suspect loose terminal unit. Request medical gas line inspection.
Milk kitchen hot-water not available; solar line lukewarm only. Likely circulation pump or mixing valve issue. Please attend before morning prep.
X-ray Room 1 false ceiling tile sagged and fell after heavy rain; visible leak above. Area now exposed. Kindly repair and make safe.
GenSet 2 failed to accept load during post-thunder test; sync panel tripped. Request immediate diagnosis of breaker and AVR.
Rainwater seeping into staff car park stairwell; emergency light not working. Stair is dark and slippery. Need light and drain fix.
Persistent sewer odour in OPD toilets despite cleaning. Suspect blocked vent or dry trap. Please inspect lines and reseal joints.
Fire alarm panel showing Zone 5 fault after thundery rain; intermittent beeping. Likely detector/wiring moisture ingress. Request urgent check.
Children’s ward louvre window clip broken; wind-driven rain entering near bed area. Need clip replacement and rubber beading reseal.
RO plant feed pressure low; storage tank level warning during evening storm. Request booster pump and inlet strainer check.
Main foyer ceiling leaking above registration counters; multiple buckets placed. Slip risk at queue area. Please cordon and repair.
Surgical Block roof gutter overflowing in heavy rain; downpipe blocked. Water cascading onto ambulance bay ramp. Need immediate clearance.
Burnt smell at medication prep room; one socket faceplate scorched after lightning surge. MCB warm. Circuit to be isolated and replaced.
Stair 3 emergency exit light on Level 2 dead; test button no response. Battery likely failed. Replace to maintain egress compliance.
Steam line near trap in CSSD hissing; small condensate leak making floor wet. Please isolate and repair before afternoon sterilization run.
During the evening thunderstorm, rainwater dripped through the light fitting above OPD ticketing. Risk of shorting at the counter DB; please seal roof penetration and inspect wiring.
Heavy rain caused the rear drain to back up; water is pooling at the CSSD entrance threshold. Immediate dewatering and gully clearance needed to prevent slip/contamination.
ICU AHU not holding temperature/humidity in Bed 3–6 bay; condensation forming on diffusers and dripping. Request HVAC team to check AHU-2 cooling coil and drain pan.
Fire alarm false activations reported on Maternity Stairwell, Loop-2, during rain. Panel shows intermittent moisture fault; please check detectors and cabling ingress.
Brief blackout in Surgical Ward; genset did not auto-transfer. ATS contactor appears stuck; urgent inspection and function test required before next storm.
Broken floor tile in Dialysis corridor near RO room causing a trip hazard for trolleys and patients. Request immediate repair and area cordon.
Blocked downpipe at Ward 4 balcony; water overflowing into ward doorway during rain. Need clearing of gutters and sealing of door threshold.
Main OT humidity at 70%; BMS shows AHU-3 reheat valve stuck and dehumidifier alarm active after thunder. Request immediate HVAC intervention before elective list.
Audible hiss from N2O outlet at OT-2 pendant; AVSU closed temporarily. Please test and rectify outlet/line leak and re-certify the point.
Lightning during storm tripped MDB-Admin; partial outage in Accounts/HR. UPS circuits held. Need surge protection check and insulation testing before re-energizing.
Lift-2 pit flooded due to persistent rain; sump pump not starting and lift locked at Level 1. Request dewatering and pump repair ASAP.
Water tracking along basement ceiling expansion joint; damp patch forming outside Server Room. Need sealing of joint and inspection of nearby piping/roof drain.
AHU belt squealing and airflow low in Ward 3 side A; rooms getting stuffy. Request belt replacement and filter check.
Monthly emergency lighting test: six fittings in Oncology corridor failed to illuminate. Please replace batteries/units and update log.
During violent storm, Chiller-2 tripped on high head pressure; OPD and Clinics losing cooling. Need condenser coil wash and cooling tower check.
Fire panel shows ground fault on Loop-4 (Radiology wing) after lightning. Repeated beeping; request loop isolation and detector/cable insulation test.
Ceiling tile collapsed in Pathology store after thundery rain; visible leak from above. Boxes at risk; kindly fix leak and replace damaged tiles.
Fire door to Labour Room corridor not self-closing; door closer failed. Please repair to maintain compartmentation compliance.
Strong gusts loosened a roofing sheet over Laundry; loud rattling and visible lift at corner. Need safe securing before it detaches.
Sewage backflow in Gents toilet near OPD pharmacy; gully overflowing after showers. Request jetting and check of sump/pump operation.
Handrail on main staircase (L1–L2) is loose and wobbly on the right side. Please tighten/reweld brackets; high pedestrian traffic here.
Water ingress in Main Switch Room via cable trench during intense rain; pooling adjacent to MDB-1A. Urgent pumping and sealing needed before energization risk.
Genset overheating alarm; radiator fan belt snapped while on load due to unstable CEB supply. Require belt replacement and cooling check immediately.
Heavy rain leaking through scrub area light fitting in OT-1; water dripping near electrical outlets. Please isolate, waterproof, and test circuits.
Severe storm caused a power dip; ICU UPS room is overheated as split AC tripped. Overload alarm active—need HVAC restored and UPS temp stabilized.

Water dripping through the false ceiling above the CT corridor, wetting the cable tray during the afternoon downpour. Risk to DB in Room R-02; please attend roof membrane and isolate any affected lighting circuit.
Wind-driven rain coming past the main sliding door; floor mats are saturated and the granite is slippery. Bottom seal on the door is torn—urgent replacement and rain barrier needed.
G/F Male Toilet by OPD has gully overflow after steady rain; foul smell and brown water backflow via floor trap. Request immediate jetting and inspection chamber clearing.
Seepage under generator room door; ATS panel gives intermittent earth-leak alarm when floor damp. Need door threshold sealing and panel check.
OT chiller-2 tripped on high head pressure; condenser likely fouled. OR temps trending to 25°C—please service and restore redundancy.
TB isolation room (Ward 3) negative pressure alarm; exhaust belt snapped, DP now positive to corridor. Immediate fix required to restore airflow.
Roof gutter above Stair B overflowing; water tracking into landing making tiles slick. Likely downpipe choke with leaves.
NICU AHU showing RH 72–75% with warm supply; dehumidification ineffective on this humid day. Incubators struggling to maintain setpoints.
Squally gusts have loosened a GI sheet on the OPD drop-off canopy; loud flapping and risk of detachment onto driveway.
ICU UPS/battery room at 32°C; wall extractor not working and room feels humid. Please restore ventilation to protect UPS batteries.
Oxygen manifold shed roof leaking; water on secondary regulators and condensation on gauges after prolonged rain. Need urgent roof patch and safe drying.
Level 2 fire exit door not self-closing; closer arm loose and door remains ajar. Compromises compartmentation.
Basement pump room sump level high; duty pump not starting, only standby runs on manual. With ongoing rain, risk to MV cables nearby.
OT-2 AHU airflow low; V-belt frayed and slipping. Theatre temp drifting to 24°C ahead of morning list.
Window frame leaking in heavy rain; water running onto bedhead trunking at Bed 12 near 230V sockets. Immediate attention needed.
Parking lot pole lights off; B-Block lighting MCB tripped. Suspect water ingress at junction box by Pole P3.
Monthly generator test: gen started but ATS took ~20 sec to transfer and failed to retransfer to CEB mains. Request ATS logic and battery check.
CSSD sterilizer feedwater pressure unstable; booster pump cavitating (possible foot/check valve issue). Two cycles aborted.
Leak at expansion joint in MRD; cartons on lower racks damp with today’s rain and breeze. Need sealing and dehumidification.
Diagnostic corridor outside X-Ray flooded 1–2 cm after heavy rain; catchpit at Door D5 overflowing with silt and leaves.
Lift A halted between G and 1; pit water level activated safety switch after rain. Passengers assisted out—lift to remain OOS until pit is pumped and reset.
Medical vacuum plant low pressure alarm; Pump-2 overheated and prefilter appears clogged. Suction weak at bedside outlets.
Cardiology OPD ceiling getting damp; AHU condensate tray overflowing onto tiles. Likely drain choke on this hot, muggy day.
ETU ambulance bay waterlogged to ankle depth; trench drain choked with debris after thunderstorm. Offloading affected—urgent clearing needed.
Main LT panel (Room L1) shows moisture tracking near neutral busbar; faint burning smell noted after rain. Request immediate dehumidification and insulation integrity test.
Rainwater dripping from OPD ceiling near registration; wet floor causing slip risk—please check roof and drainage.
Thunderstorm runoff entering generator yard; sump pump running continuously and alarm beeping.
Light rain seeped under sterile store door; cartons damp—need door seal and drain check.
Handwash sink trap leaking in Bay 2; steady drip forming puddle.
Pharmacy storeroom RH at 70%; dehumidifier not working after brief rain; risk to stock.
Leak through light fitting over triage bed during evening rain; electrical hazard.
Fire exit Stair B—exit sign and landing light are out; please restore.
Early rain blew in through main lobby doors; missing bottom seal; slippery tiles.
Theatre 2 medical air outlet showing pressure fluctuations during case; check pipeline/regulator.
ICU AHU fault; humidity high and condensate dripping near Bed 4.
Power flicker with thunder; Block B generator started but ATS chattered; lights dipped twice.
Ceiling tile sagging outside Accounts; brown stain visible; risk of fall.
After evening rain, gully overflow in anteroom; foul backflow through floor drain.
OPD hydrant cabinet seal broken; nozzle missing; replace and reseal.
Corridor handrail near MS-3 is loose and wobbly; fix brackets.
Heavy rain causing canopy gutter overflow; water splashing at ETU doorway.
Dirty utility exhaust not drawing after rain; strong odour persists.
